summary: A focus/study app with session tracking, camera-based peer connections, and motivational gratitude card feature after each focus session.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- A small golden card icon with a shiny, embossed star or sparkle motif on a rich gold gradient background, square format (gold-card-icon.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: After each focus session ends (before the break phase begins), display a small golden card icon in a corner of the screen that does not interrupt or overlap the timer display and does not block any interactive UI elements.

Implement a scratch card animation on the golden card icon when the user clicks it. The card expands or reveals a surface that the user appears to 'scratch off', progressively uncovering a short motivational/gratitude message beneath.

Maintain a predefined list of seven gratitude/motivational messages and display exactly one message per focus session, cycling through the list in a shuffled order. After all seven messages have been shown, reshuffle the list and repeat. The messages are: 'Many want to study but cannot afford internet. Thank your Lord.', 'Many are praying for opportunity. You are inside it. Alhamdulillah.', 'Not everyone gets time, access, and ability together. You do. Thank your Lord.', 'Learning is rizq.', 'You are in a position many wish for.', 'Some want education but doors were closed. Yours are open. Thank your creator.', 'Rabbi zidni ilma — My Lord, increase me in knowledge.'

new_feature_requests.summary: After each focus session, show a non-intrusive golden card icon in the corner. Clicking it triggers a scratch animation revealing a shuffled gratitude/motivational message (e.g. 'Learning is rizq', 'Rabbi zidni ilma', etc.). Messages cycle through a predefined list, shuffled per session.
